app_role_ids.description: A map of application role IDs associated with the service principal.

application_tenant_id.description: The tenant ID where the application is registered.

display_name.description: The display name of the service principal.

id.description: The unique ID of the service principal.

oauth2_permission_scope_ids.description: A map of OAuth2 permission scope IDs associated with the service principal.

object_id.description: The object ID of the service principal in Azure Active Directory.

service_principal_names.description: A list of names for the service principal.
